get.description: Check api health.
Check api health.
Retrieve the authenticated user's resume.

post.description: Create a new resume for the authenticated user.

Facebook OAuth2 Login.

Exchange Facebook access token for JWT tokens.

Args:
    request: The HTTP request object
    data: Facebook login data containing access_token

Returns:
    JWT tokens and user information

Google OAuth2 Login.

Exchange Google access token for JWT tokens.

Args:
    request: The HTTP request object
    data: Google login data containing access_token

Returns:
    JWT tokens and user information

Apple Sign In OAuth2 Login.

Exchange Apple identity token (id_token) for JWT tokens.

Args:
    request: The HTTP request object
    data: Apple login data containing id_token

Returns:
    JWT tokens and user information

get.description: Retrieve a list of hosts created by the authenticated user, with optional filtering by frequency.
Retrieve a list of vacancies for a specific host.

post.description: Create a new vacancy for a host.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific vacancy.

post.description: Create or get a conversation with another user.

get.description: List all conversations for the current user.
Get messages in a conversation with pagination.

post.description: Send a message in a conversation.

patch.description: Mark messages as read in a conversation.

get.description: List all forum categories (public).
List forum threads with pagination (public).
Get a thread with its replies (public).

post.description: Create a reply to a thread.
Add images to a thread (author only).

delete.description: Remove an image from a thread (author only).

post.description: Add images to a reply (author only).

delete.description: Remove an image from a reply (author only).

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's helper profile.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's helper profile.

post.description: Create a new helper profile for the authenticated user.
Helper submits an application to a vacancy.

get.description: View applications where user is either the helper or the vacancy host.
Get a specific application by ID. Accessible by both helper and vacancy host.
Search active vacancies with available capacity, optionally matching a specific date range.
Retrieve a list of calendar events for a specific host.

patch.description: Host updates a calendar event (e.g., modifying dates or remarks).

get.description:
Get all photos in a host's album (public).

Returns a paginated list of photos belonging to the given host.

post.description: Upload one or more photos to the host's album (host owner only).

delete.description: Delete a specific photo from the host's album (host owner only).

post.description: Create a post for the host.

get.description: List posts for a host.
Get a post by ID.

post.description: Create a comment on a post.

get.description: List comments for a post.

delete.description: Delete a comment from a post.

post.description: Toggle like status on a post.
